viewpoint: AI threats are converging — offensive AI tools are lowering attacker skill barriers while also enabling more sophisticated multi-vector campaigns that span multiple threat categories.
speaker_note: The convergence of AI-enabled offense and AI-targeted attacks represents a compounding risk that traditional siloed threat categorization may underestimate. Integrated detection strategies are needed.
